{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323192330CB422607F8F269CBB224"}"},"total":84},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7608879434617881406","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"追平啦，整体还可以 (◍＞◡＜◍)
美中不足的是作者大大的文笔比较一般，主线剧情有点平淡，但给人一种细水长流的感觉。前期剧情有点漏洞和错字，希望作者大大可以去修改一下
比较惊艳我的是感情线，全程高甜（xql磕死我了）
全文没什么虐点，感情线占比似乎大于事业线（？），全文主要还是在磕cp。喜欢看感情线和磕cp的值得一看
给了个5星ദ്ദി˶>ω<)✧，期待作者大大写得更好","text_exts":[{"e":54,"s":50,"text":"细水长流","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%BB%86%E6%B0%B4%E9%95%BF%E6%B5%81&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177426501069CBB224%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227608879434617881406%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227588841952041258009%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%BB%86%E6%B0%B4%E9%95%BF%E6%B5%81%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771583807,"group_id":"7588841952041258009","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不嬷主角天理难容","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5JBbJo/qw3UNixpjLo2mL8=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f5212acae2664ab7857110f364391f99~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796189&x-signature=vMKzo7nomucYC8xM8OnPBfkL4I0%3D","user_id":"276683291890059","user_name":"Words-荧"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"276683291890059","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7588841952041258009","book_info":{"abstract":"【电竞双男主，重生，全员真香修罗场，甜宠爽文，游戏直播，1v1，he，双洁】
【白切黑偏执深情攻×清冷钓系美人受】
宁修越上辈子为队友扛伤，为战队背锅，最终被全网追杀，惨死在雨夜街角。
再睁眼，他回到和POT战队签约当天。
经理笑着推来合同：“战队需要你这样的奉献型辅助。”
宁修越拿起合同，撕成两半。
“我不签了。”
后来，国服出现一个神秘辅助，ID【Fix】。
操作狠戾，从不保人，只杀人。却以恐怖胜率稳踞国服第一。
全网疯狂扒马甲，却始终不知是谁。直到比赛场他银发蓝眸，撩动全场。
————
后来陆易捡起宁修越撕碎的合同，裱进水晶框。
宁修越踹他：“你有病？挂这个干嘛！”
陆易笑，把框挂床头正中央：“这是你的重生宣言。我要每天看，提醒自己。”
他低头吻宁修越眉心：
“我跨越两辈子，才从死神手里抢回来的。”
“所以谁再敢碰，我真的会杀人。”
————
全球总决赛夺冠夜，宁修越被自家队长陆易按在奖杯陈列室的玻璃柜前亲。
他被亲得眼尾泛红，咬牙骂：“陆易这是奖杯室！”
陆易咬他后颈，低笑：“嗯，正好。”
门外脚步徘徊，声音不甘：
“陆易，你出来。”
“宁修越不属于你！”
“他是全联盟的！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/1aa0fcbc300efa2605f29369b6bfe5f0","author":"雪菜豆腐","author_id":"","book_id":"7588841952041258009","book_name":"电竞万人嫌全能辅助重生成万人迷","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8c088","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8571人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":508,"name":"电竞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=508&name=电竞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":509,"name":"游戏主播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=509&name=游戏主播&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":484,"name":"HE","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=484&name=HE&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":853,"name":"白切黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=853&name=白切黑&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":856,"name":"全能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=856&name=全能&
